# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev-threetier-vnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Network
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.0.0/16"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Virtual Network
  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.1.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Web tier subnet
  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.2.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the App tier subnet
  dbSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.3.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Database tier subnet

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: web-tier-nsg
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-HTTP-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Allow-HTTPS-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: app-tier-nsg
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-Web-To-App
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "8080"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: db-tier-nsg
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-App-To-DB
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'web-tier-nsg')]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'app-tier-nsg')]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'db-tier-nsg')]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      enableDdosProtection: false
      subnets:
        - name: web-subnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'web-tier-nsg')]"
        - name: app-subnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'app-tier-nsg')]"
        - name: db-subnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'db-tier-nsg')]"

outputs:
  vnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  webSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), 'web-subnet')]"
  appSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), 'app-subnet')]"
  dbSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), 'db-subnet')]"
